pkgmetadata.longdescription:
This is a prototype implementation of the idea presented in Combining Syntatic and Semantic Bidirectionalization by Janis Voigtlaender, Zhenjiang Hu, Kazutaka Matsuda and Meng Wang.
This package builds two executables to experiment with the system, a command line program "b18-combined" and a CGI based web interface "b18n-combined-cgi". The latter is also available on http://www.kb.ecei.tohoku.ac.jp/~kztk/b18n-combined/
